mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twork (twid, tid, cid, wtitle, tcontent, tpublish, deadline, scale) VALUES (#{twid}, #{tid}, #{cid}, #{wtitle}, #{tcontent}, #{tpublish}, #{deadline}, #{scale})
mapper.select: SELECT twid, tid, cid, wtitle, tcontent, tpublish, deadline, scale FROM twork WHERE cid = #{cid} ORDER BY tpublish DESC
SELECT twid, tid, cid, wtitle, tcontent, tpublish, deadline, scale FROM twork WHERE twid = #{twid}
SELECT twid, wtitle FROM twork WHERE cid = #{cid}
SELECT wtitle FROM twork WHERE cid = #{cid} ORDER BY tpublish LIMIT 1
